title: Problems encountered when using the right join field function and monocular operators together
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 String NOT NULL, c1 Int32 DEFAULT 0, PRIMARY KEY(c0));
CREATE TABLE t3(c0 Float64, c1 UInt8 DEFAULT 1, PRIMARY KEY(c0));
SELECT t2.c0, t3.c1 FROM t2 RIGHT JOIN t3 ON t2.c1 = t3.c0 WHERE t3.c1 IN (1, 0);
key_bug_features: Right join with FIELD function and monocular operators
